items.title:
[正面] [h2]Nearly Mythos the Mark[/h2]

Steam requires a ...
items.summary:
[h2]Nearly Mythos the Mark[/h2]

Steam requires a conventional thumb choice, but if it didn't, mine would be non-Euclidian. 

[h3]Contentacles:[/h3]
- Solid, albeit familiar, card play. Plenty of combo build craft.
- Captivating art style. Those CGs get pretty gnarly once in a while. 
- Fantastic audio work. The foley is juicy. Eerie soundtrack. Japanese voice talent belt out those "shi-ne"s with conviction.

[h3]Lamentacles:[/h3]
- Even Lovecraft's prose made more sense at making less sense then this game's translation. Especially egregious when it uses different words for core card mechanics.
- Said translation courtesy of ChatGPT, which sparks more dread in me than anything in this game.
- Combat animations fail to excite, horrify or shock.
- PC client hitchy.

[h3]In Strange Gacha, Cash Bye-Bye:[/h3]
- You get 2 selectable SSRs after 1 week of logging in. It's quite possible to build effective teams around a character pair.
- 5 pulls instead of 10 pulls. Feels like you pull more often compared to leading brands (initially . . .)
- Does all the gacha stuff otherwise. Energy gates block access to progression resources. Multiple confusing currencies. Exchanges that trick you into suboptimal purchases.

[h3]Recommend To:[/h3] [i](Assuming Gacha doesn't trigger a SAN check)[/i]
- Slay the Spire addicts who possess the forbidden knowledge of arcane R34 tags.
- Anyone insisting ChatGPT should replace localizers. Behold, your paradise.

[h3]Alternatively Suggest:[/h3]
- [b]Reverse: 1999[/b]: Dig this game's art style? This gacha has it, along with a superior presentation compared to Morimens. Better, more flashy animations, proper English voice acting, and a more cohesive narrative (which, given it's a game featuring time travel, is saying something). All good things come with sacrifice, of course, and in this case, the price is Morimen's card play.

- [b]Limbus Company/Library of Ruina[/b]: Dig the atmosphere? Both of these titles cultivate a creepy cryptid vibe while also offering engrossing moment to moment card play. Limbus is your gacha parallel (and a mechanically dense one at that), but Library of Ruina is a buy and own title for those who favor the old gods over the new.

Overall, the game does enough to lure a hopeless card and foley junkie like me into its inky, machine translated abyss, but for those able to resist that siren's song, consider my alternatives.

[hr][/hr]

Did this review help you? Do you think I might help you find other games you like? [url=https://store.steampowered.com/curator/43226863/]Check out my Curator Page[/url] and put me to your test.

items.title:
[负面] 新人快跑！这是一款真是校校又猫猫啊的游戏,
----------------------------...
items.summary:
新人快跑！这是一款真是校校又猫猫啊的游戏,
-----------------------------------------------------
忘却前夜x 难忘今宵x星辰前夜√
限制出牌，限制算力，砍狂气，中毒，反击，扣死亡抵抗，觉醒扣银匙，觉醒的越多甚至还能扣到负数.
这就是你游所谓的激动人心的新（赤石）玩法，所有派系都给你砍咯
你以为键帽退到幕后，游戏就算打赢复活赛了？太年轻了！
--------------------------------------------------------
整天看你们尬黑5771真的很没意思，游戏厂商只是看在你们是老玩家的份儿上不和你计较而已，你的账号和身份证号手机号都是在厂商手里的。一味地欺负键帽脾气好，你们再这样变本加厉，难道不怕键帽的忍耐到达尽头，不顾往日的情面把你们的号封掉？你们找谁说理去。就算告到联合国，也是会保护厂商的利益，我是内部人士，联合国里是有灵犀互娱的股份的...
